name: Sourdough Rye
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 c Bread flour with Dried onion
2 ts Gluten in bottom of cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix until well combined and form into a dough.
3. Let the dough rest for about an hour.
4. Shape the dough into a loaf.
5. Place the loaf on a baking sheet and cover with a towel.
6. Allow it to rise until doubled in size, about 1-2 hours.
7. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Let cool before slicing.
